summary: Tested iteration 14: team invite/remove fix + Custom Board Views CRUD. Backend pytest 10/10 PASS. Frontend invite (no 'Only team members' error), remove member buttons (13 visible for non-admin), and Saved Views (create + list + appear in dropdown + 'Views (1)' counter) all verified end-to-end via Playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Save current view' (a Radix DropdownMenuItem) auto-closes the dropdown, so the view-name input field never becomes visible inline. User has to re-open the Views dropdown to find the input. Fix: prevent default close on this menu item, e.g. onSelect={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setSavingView(true); }}, or use a non-DropdownMenuItem element for the Save trigger.

React console error: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for member rows (3 distinct user_ids repeated). This is because the team document contains duplicate member entries (same user_id appearing in 'active' and 'removed' status, or duplicates from previous test runs). Recommend de-duplicating by user_id when rendering, or using a composite key like `${user_id}-${status}`.

action_items: Fix Views dropdown 'Save current view' UX: use onSelect with e.preventDefault() so the dropdown stays open and the inline input is reachable in one click instead of two.

Fix React duplicate-key warnings on TeamPage by either de-duplicating members by user_id or using a composite key (user_id + status). Long-term: clean up the team document so a user_id only appears once.
critical_code_review_comments: view_routes.py: No ownership/permission check on DELETE /views/{view_id} – any authenticated user can delete any view. Consider scoping by board permission or created_by.
view_routes.py: GET /views/board/{board_id} has no board access check – any authenticated user can list views for any board id.
team_routes.py invite endpoint comment now says 'any authenticated user can invite' – business intent should be confirmed (no rate-limit, no spam protection).
team_routes.py remove_team_member: any team member can remove any other member including admins. Consider preventing non-admins from removing admins.
seed_data_creation: Created and removed several TEST_-prefixed invited members; created and deleted board views via API. One UI-saved view 'TEST_View_950854' may persist on board 80443bd5-2839-4909-955b-e13157def5eb.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_views_team.py covers invite (no membership required), remove member (any member), and views CRUD. Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_views_team.py -v. Board URL pattern is /boards/{id} (NOT /board/{id}). Saved-view input requires reopening dropdown after clicking 'Save current view' due to Radix behavior – note this when scripting Playwright.
